title: Extent and manner of assessment
doc_html:
§1952.1.  Extent and manner of assessment

Standing timber shall be assessed only to the extent and in the manner such timber was assessed prior to December 31, 1995.

Acts 1997, No. 688, §1, eff. July 7, 1997.
doc_text:
§1952.1.  Extent and manner of assessment
Standing timber shall be assessed only to the extent and in the manner such timber was assessed prior to December 31, 1995.
Acts 1997, No. 688, §1, eff. July 7, 1997.
